packs.intended_use: Local mentor-worker benchmark development and regression tracking.
packs.limitations: Synthetic tasks only; does not represent full production software engineering workloads.
packs.contamination_risks: Model pretraining may include overlapping coding patterns and idioms.
packs.evaluation_recommendations: Use deterministic seeds, compare worker-only vs mentored modes, and report confidence intervals.

packs.intended_use: Primary default benchmark pack for official and community comparisons.
packs.limitations: Task scope remains bounded and intentionally excludes long-horizon repository maintenance; the benchmark measures test-driven repair ability under a visible pytest oracle.
packs.contamination_risks: Synthetic generation reduces direct copying risk but cannot eliminate learned pattern overlap; raw source generation included duplicate templates that are deduplicated in the active release pack.
packs.evaluation_recommendations: For headline claims use dev/dev50/test with multi-seed protocol, task-family bootstrap analysis, and the exact-family-independent active release pack.
